column1: # The Mechanist graphics package tier manifest

column7: Bundled fallback tier. Must always be present and remains the final fallback for missing higher tiers.
Recommended default for most installs. Better visual quality with moderate disk/download cost.
Higher quality package for stronger machines and larger displays. Falls back to standard_64 then low_32.
Largest/highest source tier. Falls back to intermediate_128, then standard_64, then low_32.
